LOW WATER CROSSINGS FLOODED. 0.75-0.99 INCHS OF RAINFALL IN 30 MINUTES.

WIDESPREAD FLOODING IN THE AREA OF US HIGHWAY 82 AND COUNTY ROAD 206. TRUCK DRIVERS REPORTED SAME TO SHERIFFS OFFICE ALSO INDICATING LOW SPOTS ON COUNTY ROAD 206 HAD 2 FEET OF WATER AND WAS NEARLY IMPASSABLE.
EDDY COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTED THAT NORTH BOLTON WAS BEING CLOSED DUE TO WATER OVER THE ROADWAY.

FM 1901 AND HWY 305 HAS BEEN CLOSED SOUTH OF MCCAMEY AND INTO PECOS COUNTY, WATER IS RUNNING OVER THE ROAD MAKING IT IMPASSABLE
SEVERAL ROADS ARE CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING IN IRAAN
MULTIPLE STREETS BARACADED DUE TO HIGH WATER. NUMEROUS STALLED VEHICLES.
LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT REPORT SIGNIFICANT FLOODING IN AND AROUND HOBBS WITH MULTIPLE STALLED VEHICLES AND A FEW MOTOR VEHICLE ACCIDENTS
NUMEROUS REPORTS OF FLOODING NORTH AND NORTHWEST OF SEMINOLE...INCLUDING THE CITY OF SEMINOLE. MULTIPLE STRANDED MOTORISTS ALONG STATE HIGHWAY 214 AND US HIGHWAY 385/62.

STATE HWY 349 FROM US 90 TO FM 3166 IS CLOSED DUE TO PAVEMENT AND BRIDGE DAMAGE FROM FLOODING. TXDOT CREWS ARE WORKING TO REPAIR. ADDITIONALLY STATE HWY 349 IS DOWN TO ONE LATE NEAR BIG CANYON DRAW. ONLY LIGHT TRAFFIC ALLOWED...NO HEAVY VEHICLES PERMITTED UNTIL REPAIRED.

PAVEMENT DAMAGED AT INDEPENDENCE CREEK AND OTHER LOW WATER CROSSINGS IN THIS AREA. ADDITIONAL DAMAGE TO GUARDRAILS AND PAVEMENT HAS BEEN REPORTED THROUGHOUT EASTERN PECOS COUNTY AND NORTHEASTERN TERRELL COUNTY.
